prompt: According to github, when was Regression added to the oldest closed numpy.polynomial issue that has the Regression label in MM/DD/YY?
actual:
04/15/18

The oldest closed numpy.polynomial issue with the Regression label is **issue #10881** ("Not working `rundocs()` in `numpy\\lib\\tests\\test_polynomial.py`"), created on April 11, 2018. According to the GitHub event timeline, the Regression label (originally named "05 - Regression" at the time, later renamed to "06 - Regression") was added to this issue on **April 15, 2018 at 08:41:56 UTC**.

In MM/DD/YY format: **04/15/18**

- Title: "Not working `rundocs()` in `numpy\\lib\\tests\\test_polynomial.py`"
- Created: 2018-04-11T05:48:45Z
- Labels: "06 - Regression", "component: numpy.polynomial", "component: numpy.testing"

I found the answer. Looking at the events for issue #10881, the Regression label (originally named "05 - Regression" at the time) was added on 2018-04-15T08:41:56Z.

The label was originally called "05 - Regression" and was later renamed to "06 - Regression" in the numpy repo. But when it was added to issue #10881, it was labeled as "05 - Regression" on 2018-04-15.
